hero.title: Short a worker tomorrow? Fill the gap in minutes.
hero.subtitle: CRAFT-ON connects construction sites with skilled tradespeople for same-day and next-day work. Post a job, get matched, get it done — with paperwork, safety, and trust built in.
hero.freeNote: Free for workers · Contractors pay only per match

audience.title: Built for both sides of the site
audience.subtitle: Whether you swing the hammer or run the site, CRAFT-ON is made for you.

worker.title: Find fair-paid work on your free days
worker.body: Browse same-day and next-day jobs near you and apply in a tap. Build a profile that proves your skill, earn reviews, and grow your reputation. It's 100% free — no fees, ever.

contractor.title: Reach approved tradespeople in minutes
contractor.body: Post a job and matching, vetted workers apply right away — no interviews, no phone tag. Review applicants, confirm in a tap, and keep the whole job in one place.

step1.title: Post a job
step1.body: A contractor posts a same-day or next-day job — trade, date, wage, and site.

step2.title: Apply & match
step2.body: Matching workers apply, and the contractor confirms one in a single tap.

step3.title: Get it done
step3.body: Check in on site, report completion, and approve — all tracked in the app.

step4.title: Build trust
step4.body: Both sides leave reviews that build a lasting, portable reputation.

features.title: Why CRAFT-ON
features.subtitle: More than a contact list — the tools to run the job, too.

spot.title: Spot matching in minutes
spot.body: Same-day and next-day jobs matched by trade and area — no calls, no waiting.

noshow.title: Anti-no-show system
noshow.body: Confirmations and trust scores keep both sides reliable, so jobs don't fall through.

trust.title: Profiles & two-way reviews
trust.body: Qualifications, tools, and past work on every profile; honest ratings on both sides.

foreign.title: Foreign-worker ready
foreign.body: Multilingual support and built-in visa / work-permission checks keep hiring compliant.

safe.title: Safe & private
safe.body: Contact details stay masked and chat is filtered until a match is confirmed.

free.title: Free for workers
free.body: Workers never pay. Contractors pay a simple flat fee per completed match.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Join CRAFT-ON and fill your next shift — or your next job — today.

common.offline: You are offline. Some actions may not work.
common.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

auth.devHint: Dev mode: any code logs you in.
auth.resetHint: Verify your phone by SMS, then set a new password.
auth.roleWorkerDesc: Find and apply for site work
auth.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3–64 characters: letters, numbers, . _ -
auth.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number: pick the country code, then digits only.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
auth.phoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number already has an account — you have been signed in to it.

onboarding.currentEmployerPublic: Show employer on my public profile
onboarding.pendingReview: Under review. Please wait for approval.
onboarding.qualificationsPlaceholder: e.g. grade-2 certified skilled worker, slinging
onboarding.whSummaryPlaceholder: e.g. Interior finishing for Tokyo apartment renovations; strong at fixture work and boarding.
onboarding.workHistoryHint: Your total experience is calculated from the years below.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: e.g. 10 years as a carpenter; careful, high-quality interior finishing.
onboarding.completeLater: Work history, qualifications, skills, tools and your bio can be added any time from profile settings after registration.

jobs.empty: There are no open jobs right now.
jobs.outOfArea: Outside the service area. Please join the waitlist.
jobs.savedEmpty: You haven't saved any jobs yet.
jobs.emptyHint: New jobs are posted daily — adjust your filters or check back soon.
jobs.savedEmptyHint: Tap the star on any job to keep it here for later.
jobs.myEmpty: You have not posted any jobs yet.
jobs.myEmptyHint: Post your first job to start receiving applications.
jobs.nightShiftHint: For night shifts, enter the end time as 24+ hours (e.g. 21:00–29:00 = finishes 5:00 next morning).

applications.title: My applications
applications.emptyHint: Browse open jobs and apply — your applications will show up here.

matchings.title: Active jobs
matchings.emptyHint: Confirmed jobs appear here so you can check in and track them.
matchings.cancelConfirm: Cancel this job? This may affect your reliability rating.
matchings.cancelPolicy: Cancelling after 20:00 the night before the work date (Japan time) may incur a penalty.

history.title: Work history
history.emptyHint: Completed jobs and earnings will be recorded here.

chat.title: Chat
chat.maskingInfo: For your safety, phone numbers and contact details are hidden until the job is confirmed.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Updates about jobs, applications, and messages will appear here.

devices.title: Devices
devices.endAllOthersConfirm: End all other sessions? Those devices will be signed out.

profile.title: Profile
profile.changePasswordHint: Change the password you use to log in (8+ characters).
profile.residenceRejected: This document was rejected. Please upload a new image.
profile.residenceUploaded: New image uploaded — save your profile to submit it for review.

admin.awaitingOnboarding: Signed up but hasn't filled in their profile yet — they must complete onboarding in the app before you can approve them.
admin.seedWarning: Development only — creates random approved users and open jobs.
admin.customTradesHint: Free-text trades that aren't in the catalog. Merge them into an existing trade or promote them to a new one.

install.title: Install CRAFT-ON
install.body: Add the app to your home screen for one-tap access.

completeness.title: Profile completeness
completeness.hint: A complete profile ranks higher and wins more work.

visa.expiringBody: Your work permission expires in {days} days ({date}). Renew it to keep applying.
visa.expiredBody: Your work permission expired on {date}. Update it to apply for jobs.

templates.title: Templates
templates.draftRestored: Draft restored from your last session.

validation.datePast: The work date cannot be in the past.
validation.wagePositive: Daily wage must be greater than zero.
validation.endAfterStart: End time must be after the start time. For overnight shifts use 24+ hours (e.g. 29:00).
validation.shiftTooLong: A shift cannot be longer than 24 hours.

photos.title: Work photos
photos.hint: Show past work on your public profile. Keep it professional — photos may be removed by moderators.
photos.reuseHint: Tap an uploaded photo to reuse it (＋ to add a new one).
